results.content:
Care Guide — backpacks.
To extend the life of your backpacks: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Care Guide — jackets.
To extend the life of your jackets: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Care Guide — stoves.
To extend the life of your stoves: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Care Guide — tents.
To extend the life of your tents: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Care Guide — sleeping bags.
To extend the life of your sleeping bags: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Zephyra Outfitters Volume Discount Policy.
Orders with a merchandise subtotal over $500 receive a 10% discount on the subtotal. The discount applies to merchandise only, not shipping fees. No coupon code is required; the discount is applied automatically at invoicing.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Atlantic region.
Standard shipping to the Atlantic region costs $9.99 and express shipping costs $19.99. Orders to Atlantic arrive 3 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Ontario region.
Standard shipping to the Ontario region costs $6.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Ontario arrive 5 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Pacific region.
Standard shipping to the Pacific region costs $4.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Pacific arrive 3 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.

Zephyra Outfitters Shipping — Prairie region.
Standard shipping to the Prairie region costs $9.99 and express shipping costs $17.99. Orders to Prairie arrive 4 business days after the order is placed. Shipping is calculated per order, not per item.
